'''vajasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebraback|zebraback]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebraback|zebraback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vajasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væjæsæth|væjæsæth]] || [[word:væjæsæj|væjæsæj]] || [[word:væjæsæsh|væjæsæsh]] || [[word:væjæsæ|væjæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vajajasath|vajajasath]] || [[word:vajajasaj|vajajasaj]] || [[word:vajajasash|vajajasash]] || [[word:vajajasa|vajajasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vajasath|vajasath]] || [[word:vajasaj|vajasaj]] || [[word:vajasash|vajasash]] || [[word:vajasa|vajasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vajafsath|vajafsath]] || [[word:vajafsaj|vajafsaj]] || [[word:vajafsash|vajafsash]] || [[word:vajafsaf|vajafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vajasatha|vajasatha]] || [[word:vajasaja|vajasaja]] || [[word:vajasasha|vajasasha]] || [[word:vajasaka|vajasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vajasath|vajasath]] || [[word:vajasaj|vajasaj]] || [[word:vajasash|vajasash]] || [[word:vajasa|vajasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vajasathal|vajasathal]] || [[word:vajasajal|vajasajal]] || [[word:vajasashal|vajasashal]] || [[word:vajasakal|vajasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vajasathatha|vajasathatha]] || [[word:vajasajaja|vajasajaja]] || [[word:vajasashasha|vajasashasha]] || [[word:vajasaka|vajasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vajasathan|vajasathan]] || [[word:vajasajan|vajasajan]] || [[word:vajasashan|vajasashan]] || [[word:vajasakan|vajasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vajasathaoro|vajasathaoro]] || [[word:vajasajaoro|vajasajaoro]] || [[word:vajasashaoro|vajasashaoro]] || [[word:vajasakaoro|vajasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
